creator_id.description: Relay creator id; must match the authenticated account's primaryRelayCreatorId

campaign_id.description: Optional Campaign.id; if omitted, server resolves per docs/api/relay-native-posts.md

required_tier_id.description: Optional gate tier. Request values may be Prisma Tier.id (e.g. from GET /api/v1/relay/compose-tiers tier_id) or Tier.relayTierId for this creator; server resolves to one Tier in the post campaign. Persisted Post.requiredTierId is relay_tier_id space (see response schema).

tier_ids.description: Access tiers for the first version. Each item may be Prisma Tier.id (typical: compose-tiers tier_id) or relayTierId; server resolves per docs/api/relay-native-posts.md. Open-web posts use is_public true with an empty array.
